About Me

Building Systems
That Actually Work

I'm Yancy Pingal Liquiran, a Full-Stack Developer and IT Professional based in Surigao del Norte, Philippines. I hold a BS in Information Technology from Systems Technology Institute College and an NC II in Computer Systems Servicing from TESDA.

With over 3 years of hands-on practice, I have delivered 5 production systems — a full-stack resort booking platform for Bobon Sands & Cays (live at bobonsandsandcays.com), a medical management portal for St. Peter Diagnostics (live), a building permit fees assessment platform for LGU Claver, a legislative records management system, and an RFID-powered school attendance system currently in production.

Beyond development, I currently serve as both IT Instructor and IT Manager / Systems Administrator at Surigao Education Center — teaching web programming, networking, and database systems while managing the school's full network infrastructure.

In 2026 I was recognized as a WorldSkills Philippines – Caraga Regional Expert for IT Software Business (ITSB), reflecting my commitment to international professional standards in software development.

I am actively seeking remote and work-from-home opportunities worldwide — freelance, contract, or full-time.

What I Bring

  • Full-stack web development — Vue.js + Laravel
  • Resort & hospitality booking platforms
  • Government & enterprise system experience
  • Desktop app development (.NET WinForms)
  • Database design & admin — MySQL, SQL Server
  • Systems administration & network infrastructure
  • IT instruction & curriculum development
  • WorldSkills 2026 Caraga Expert — ITSB
  • Remote-ready, reliable & deadline-driven

IsleRéserve — Resort Booking Platform

Full-stack booking and reservation platform for Bobon Sands & Cays Exclusive Resort in Socorro, Surigao del Norte.
